name: mdrone
description: A browser drone machine for long-form listening and live performance.

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/build-worklet.mjs && node scripts/write-version-json.mjs && node scripts/build-icons.mjs
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node scripts/fix-test-imports.mjs && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.preaudit:presets: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node scripts/fix-test-imports.mjs && node scripts/build-worklet.mjs
scripts.preaudit:fingerprints: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node scripts/fix-test-imports.mjs && node scripts/build-worklet.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && gh-pages -d dist --dotfiles -b gh-pages
